title: Appendix 7: Mapping Connections: An understanding of neurological conditions in Canada – Stakeholder engagement panel - Canada.ca
content:
## Appendix 7: Mapping Connections: An understanding of neurological conditions in Canada – Stakeholder engagement panel

### National Population Health Study of Neurological Conditions: Stakeholder Engagement Panel
- Patti Bryant Chair, Dravet.ca Secretary/Treasurer, Newfoundland and Labrador Health Libraries Association Coordinator, Document Delivery, Health Sciences Library, Memorial University of Newfoundland Director, Dravet.org Treasurer, Epilepsy Newfoundland and Labrador
- Larry Chambers, PhD, FACE, HonFFPH Scientific Advisor, Alzheimer Society of Canada
- Christine Crosbie, BA Public Relations and Strategic Communications Professional
- Yazmine Laroche, BA Associate Deputy Minister, Transport Infrastructure and Communities, Infrastructure Canada
- Robert Lester, MD Retired, Executive Vice President, Medical and Academic Affairs Retired, Chief Medical Executive, Sunnybrook Health Sciences Centre
- Shannon MacDonald, BA Vice President, Public Affairs and Partnerships, Canada’s Research-Based Pharmaceutical Companies (Rx&D)
- Doug Martens, BSc (Pharm) Retired, Regional Manager, Pharmacy Program, Winnipeg Regional Health Authority Volunteer, Parkinson Society Manitoba and Parkinson Society Canada
- Suzanne McKenna Intake/System Navigator for Acquired Brain Injury, Champlain Community Care Access Centre
- Judy Murray, MSc Coordinator, District Stroke Centre, Mackenzie Health
- Jay Onysko, MA Acting Director, Chronic Disease Surveillance Division, Public Health Agency of Canada
- James Orr, BA, LLB Director, Codes and Standards/Safety Services, Alberta Municipal Affairs Past Chair, Alberta and Northwest Territories Division, Multiple Sclerosis Society of Canada
- Peter Rosenbaum, MD, FRCPC Professor, Department of Pediatrics, McMaster University Canada Research Chair, Childhood Disability Co-founder, CanChild Centre for Childhood Disability Research
- David Simmonds Retired, Former Chair, Parkinson Society Canada Chair, Stakeholder Engagement Panel
